description: Brett (BRETT) emerged in 2024 on Base as the chain’s cultural mascot, fueled by viral humor, meme synergy, and rapid community momentum. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 BRETT gives original BRETT holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Brett
